options.name: -adjustment_table
options.description: Tables giving detail of hold and setup cycle adjustments between clock waveforms

options.name: -arrival_points
options.description: Reports only the clock arrival points

options.name: -clocks
options.description: Requests information on a specific ideal (or generated) clock

options.name: -delay_adjustment_table
options.description: Tables giving detail of early and late path delay adjustments between clock waveforms

options.name: -description
options.description: Reports only the description of the specified clock waveform(s)

options.name: -generated
options.description: Includes information on generated clocks in the report

options.name: -hierarchy
options.description: Reports the inter-clock relationship in tree style format

options.name: -insertion
options.description: Reports the network insertion delays specified on clock waveforms

options.name: -phase_shift_table
options.description: Reports the table that details the phase shift between clock waveforms

options.name: -source_insertion
options.description: Reports the source insertion delays specified on clock waveforms

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -total_shift_table
options.description: Reports one of the tables (late or early mode) that details the total relationship between clock waveforms

options.name: -uncertainty_table
options.description: Reports one of the tables (late mode or early mode) that detail the uncertainty between clock waveforms

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a report for the specified analysis view only (string, optional) > <filename> # Writes the report to the specified file name (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # Writes the report to the specified file name
